name: Silver Axe - The Honest Elf
short_description: Classic 2D platformer, play as a nimble elf and dash through the ancient fairytale forest. Defeat powerful Insomniac creatures, cast spells by combining four elements to summon thunder and entangle flame. Collect the heart of the goddess, unleash the hidden power of your Silver Axe.
detailed_description:
Introducing "Silver Axe: The Honest Elf" - a classic 2D action game that revolves around challenging boss battles set in an ancient fairy tale forest. As players fight off insomniac animals and embark on a journey to awaken the goddess, they will discover a world full of imagination and creativity.

Based on Aesop's fable "The Honest Woodcutter," the game offers players an opportunity to face off against formidable foes, all while reclaiming the goddess's golden heart and unlocking the hidden power of the silver axe.

Throughout the game, players will complete missions given to them by forest residents, gaining invaluable assistance in breaking through challenging levels. By gathering information on their enemies' weaknesses, using secret passages to launch surprise attacks, and organizing teammates for a free-spirited playthrough as an elf, players will experience a smooth and exciting gameplay experience.

The game offers players the choice to rely on the assistance of forest residents to overcome obstacles, or to be an arrogant elf who relies on ancient powers to sweep away all obstacles. Each choice will take the story on a different path, ensuring that no two playthroughs are the same. Get ready to immerse yourself in the fascinating world of "Silver Axe: The Honest Elf" and embark on an adventure like no other!

Game Features

  • A unique magic system that allows players to freely cast skills and spells by combining four buttons.
  • Boss battles are the core of the level design, providing an uninterrupted combat experience.
  • A fairy tale adventure full of imagination, where players can interact with cute and humorous animal residents.
  • Smooth and challenging action design that tests players' gaming skills.
  • Multiple branching storylines and endings, allowing players to awaken the goddess and uncover the secrets hidden deep in the forest.

supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese
